text: The sterile white walls and the glow of digital displays combine to give me a curious sense of anticipation. I feel as if I am on the threshold of discovery, in a space dedicated to questions, progress, and the interplay between human thought and machine reasoning. The R+D motif suggests exploration and invention. There is a buzz of potential and a gentle reminder to consider the future of our coexistence with technology. I feel both inspired and cautious—an eager participant in the story unfolding around me.
